expectations.text: Correctly assigns all 3 MFA safeguards to IG2
expectations.evidence: Incorrectly assigns 6.3 and 6.4 to IG1; 6.5 to IG2 — all three are IG2 in v8
Explains FIDO2/WebAuthn as origin-bound cryptographic authentication

expectations.text: Explains SMS OTP vulnerabilities (SIM swap, AiTM/real-time phishing)
expectations.evidence: Describes SIM swapping, SS7 interception, and AiTM vulnerabilities of SMS OTP

expectations.text: Notes CIS flags SMS OTP for privileged access as an explicit pitfall
expectations.evidence: Mentions SMS OTP "discouraged by CIS and deprecated by NIST"
